extra.reason: Fix applied: Limitation #10 in feasibility-report.md now cites robustness-checks.md Check 1's A-only vs A+B result (MRR 0.2543 vs 0.2539) instead of describing the ablation as still-open.

D015: config/experiment.json (versioned params), _manifest per artifact (config hash, git commit, env versions, sha256 per input parquet), fresh-run drift test (SCOUTLENS_DRIFT=1) completing docs<->artifact<->fresh-run chain. Drift test caught real nondeterminism (transferred_pairs row order) on first run; fixed with sort + regression test. All 3 drift tests pass; 117 unit tests pass.

Protocol designed and pre-registered: docs/recruitment-validation-protocol.md + D016. Blinded expert shortlist study, 40 role-stratified queries, 3 arms (B / role+minutes / random), anchored 1-5 rubric, Krippendorff alpha reliability gate, paired Wilcoxon primary, 3 pre-declared failure criteria, privacy/license constraints, execution checklist for scoutlens-h00.

Fully reconciled (D017): paper's Table 1 per-competition values reproduced exactly (sum 4,362 = per-competition rostered counts); printed total 4,299 is an arithmetic error in the paper itself; distinct union 3,618 = 3,603 profiled + 15 unused-bench players (0 min, 0 events). Pinned by tests/data/test_player_counts.py; docs updated (data-provenance, feasibility-report x2).

D018: bootstrap_mrr_delta_clustered implemented (deterministic, order-independent, raises on unmapped queries; 4 unit tests). Check 6 in robustness-checks.md: team-clustered CI [0.2044,0.2525] (~23% wider), league-clustered [0.1952,0.2510] — conclusion unchanged, delta far from zero. Limitation #12 annotated as checked; iid interval retained as published headline, labeled approximate.
User decided: MIT (D019). LICENSE added, pyproject license field set, README updated, Limitation #9 closed. Code only — data licenses (CC BY 4.0 / StatsBomb constraints) unchanged.

All acceptance criteria met: (1) bd on user PATH (verified in registry; fresh processes resolve it); (2) refs/dolt/data now exists on origin — root cause was Windows 260-char path limit in the embedded Dolt git-remote-cache, fixed with git config --global core.longpaths true, NOT auth as the error hints suggested; (3) JSONL policy documented in CLAUDE.md+AGENTS.md: tracked deliberately, DB is source of truth, never hand-merge; (4) bd lint clean (11 issues, no template warnings); (5) dependency chains verified: 0sg.1->8mc.1->8mc.2->8mc.3->h00->qop, v0.2 experiments gated on the tag; (6) final lint/blocked/ready reviewed.
